---
title: 'Get paid to work for God?'
date: '2020-01-25T18:24:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'Musings'
---

<p dir="ltr">Are you employed by God?</p><p dir="ltr">... ...</p><p dir="ltr">Not by "The Church".</p><p dir="ltr">Not in a "Ministry".</p><p dir="ltr">But actually working for God himself.</p><p dir="ltr">You can be a banker, writer, contractor, ditch digger, hair stylist, teacher, artist, etc... At you day job, but still be employed by God.</p><p dir="ltr">He's asking us to love people well and usher them to His presence.</p><p dir="ltr">He pays his harvesters and planters well.</p><p dir="ltr">I'm broadening my perspective today. Instead of putting my head down and making it... I will look up, and see who might need my Daddy's touch today.</p><p dir="ltr">Far more difficult than it sounds but far more rewarding.</p><p dir="ltr">Selah.</p><p dir="ltr"><br></p><p dir="ltr"></p><div class="separator"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1579976589493350-0-90a4b75b5b67.png" imageanchor="1"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1579976589493350-0-90a4b75b5b67.png" width="400"></a></div><div class="separator"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1579976577673616-1-755ff42f6f35.png" imageanchor="1"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1579976577673616-1-755ff42f6f35.png" width="400"></a></div><div><br></div>
